name: Penance
outward: sap stamina from {target} through divine judgement

name: Dissolution
inward: reagent stock consumed proportional to magnitude

name: Keen Edge
outward: strikes hit weak points, bonus damage on {target}

name: Divine Sight
outward: reveal hidden weaknesses and concealed threats
inward: caster attention narrows; peripheral awareness reduced

name: Ignis
outward: ignite {target}, dealing burn damage over time
inward: caster heat builds; cooling required between uses

name: Divine Flame
inward: caster piety consumed; must pray to restore

name: Infernal Brand
outward: mark {target} with unstable fire; detonates on death
inward: caster takes chip damage each tick brand is active

name: Dread Presence
outward: radiate dread; {target} accuracy and speed reduced
inward: caster corruption builds while aura is active

name: Divine Wrath
outward: strike {target} with holy terror; undead flee immediately
inward: caster must maintain conviction; fails under corruption

name: Swift Step
outward: caster movement speed and dodge distance increased

name: Fleet Blessing
outward: bless {target} with fleet feet; movement boosted
inward: caster stamina regeneration halved for duration

name: Ward of Stone
outward: erect divine barrier absorbing incoming damage for {target}
inward: caster stamina locked for barrier duration

name: Mending Touch
outward: restore {amount} health to {target} via alchemical salve
inward: consumes prepared salve from caster inventory

name: Venom Coating
outward: weapon strikes poison {target}, slow health drain
inward: coating depletes with use; requires re-application

name: Serpent Curse
outward: curse {target} with supernatural poison; resists cure
